zh.lifeSummary: 當Joan Tunstall於大約1431年出生在英國藍卡爾時，她的父親Thomas Tunstall II38歲，母親Eleanor FitzHugh38歲。她於大約1452年與Sir Roger Warde II在英國藍卡爾結婚。他們至少是3個兒子和4個女兒的父母。她去世於1507年3月6日在英國越可爾享年77歲，埋葬在英國越可爾懷吉爾。

zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当Joan Tunstall于大约1431年出生在英国藍卡爾时，她的父亲Thomas Tunstall II38岁，母亲Eleanor FitzHugh38岁。她于大约1452年与Sir Roger Warde II在英国藍卡爾结婚。他们至少是3个儿子和4个女儿的父母。她去世于1507年3月6日在英国越可爾享年77岁，埋葬在英国越可爾懷吉爾。

nameMeanings.name: Tunstall
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: English (mainly Lancashire): habitational name from any of various places called with Old English tūn-stall ‘site of a farm, farmstead’, notably Tunstall (Lancashire) and one or more of many Staffordshire places (Tunstall near Stoke on Trent, Tunstall near Adbaston, and four places called Dunstall), but also Tunstall Farm in Mountfield (Sussex) and possibly also Tunstall (Durham, Kent, Norfolk, Shropshire, Suffolk, east and North Yorkshire), and Dunstall (Lincolnshire).

variants.name: Tunstill
meanings: English (Lancashire and Yorkshire): variant of   Tunstall  .

nameMeanings.name: Joan
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: Contracted form of Old French Jo(h)anne, from Latin Io(h)anna ( see Joanna ). In England this was the usual feminine form of John from the Middle English period onwards and was extremely popular, but in the 16th and 17th centuries it steadily lost ground to Jane . It was strongly revived in the first part of the 20th century, partly under the influence of George Bernard Shaw's play St Joan ( 1923 ), based on the life of Joan of Arc ( 1412–31 ). Claiming to be guided by the voices of the saints, she persuaded the French dauphin to defy the occupying English forces and have himself crowned, and she led the French army that raised the siege of Orleans in 1429 . The following year she was captured by the Burgundians and sold to the English, and a year later she was burned at the stake for witchcraft at the age of 18 or 19. Her story has captured the imagination of many writers, and she is variously portrayed as a national and political hero, a model of apolitical straightforwardness and honesty, and a religious heroine. She was canonized in 1920 . More recent influences have included the American film actress Joan Crawford ( 1908–77 , born Lucille le Sueur ), the British actress Joan Collins ( b. 1933 ), the American comedienne Joan Rivers ( b. 1933 ), and the West Indian pop singer Joan Armatrading ( b. 1950 ).

variants.name: John
meanings: As a boy's name this represents a revival of Middle English Jan, a by‐form of John , or an adoption of the common European form with this spelling. As a girl's name it is a short form of names such as Janet and Janice .

historicEvents.title: Wars of the Roses
historicEvents.description: Wars of the Roses was a series of English civil wars for control of the throne of England between the royal families House of Lancaster and the House of York. The name of the war was derived as the red rose was the symbol of the Lancastrians and the white rose was the symbol of the Yorks.

en.lifeSummary: When Joan Tunstall was born about 1431, in Lancashire, England, her father, Thomas Tunstall II, was 38 and her mother, Eleanor FitzHugh, was 38. She married Sir Roger Warde II about 1452, in Lancashire, England. They were the parents of at least 3 sons and 4 daughters. She died on 6 March 1507, in Yorkshire, England, at the age of 77, and was buried in Wighill, Yorkshire, England.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Joan Tunstall est née environ 1431, à Lancashire, Angleterre, son père, Thomas Tunstall II, avait 38 ans et sa mère, Eleanor FitzHugh, avait 38 ans. Elle a épousé Sir Roger Warde II environ 1452, à Lancashire, Angleterre. Ils ont eu au moins 3 fils et 4 filles. Elle est décédée le 6 mars 1507, à Everwyck, Angleterre, à l’âge de 77 ans, et a été enterrée à Wighill, Everwyck, Angleterre.

de.lifeSummary: Als Joan Tunstall um 1431 in Lancashire, England geboren wurde, war ihr Vater Thomas Tunstall II 38 und ihre Mutter Eleanor FitzHugh 38. Sie hat um 1452 in Lancashire, England Sir Roger Warde II geheiratet. Sie hatten mindestens 3 Söhne und 4 Töchter. Sie starb am 6. März 1507 im Alter von 77 Jahren in Yorkshire, England und wurde in Wighill, Yorkshire, England begraben.

Lei sposato Sir Roger Warde II circa 1452, nel Lancashire, England. Erano genitori di almeno 3 figli e 4 figlie. Morì il 6 marzo 1507, nel Yorkshire, England, all'età di 77 anni, e fu sepolta a Wighill, Yorkshire, England.

ja.lifeSummary: Joan Tunstallが約1431年にイギリスランカシュアイアで生まれた時，父Thomas Tunstall IIは38歳，母Eleanor FitzHughは38歳であった。約1452年にイギリスランカシュアイアでSir Roger Warde IIと結婚した。彼らは少なくとも3人の息子と4人の娘の親であった。彼女は1507年3月6日にイギリスヨークシュアイアで77歳で死去し，イギリスヨークシュアイアウィギルにて埋葬された。

ko.lifeSummary: Joan Tunstall(이)가 대략 1431년 영국 랭카실르에서 태어났을 때, 그녀의 아버지 Thomas Tunstall II(은)는 38세였고, 그녀의 어머니 Eleanor FitzHugh(은)는 38세였다. 그녀는 대략 1452년 영국 랭카실르에서 Sir Roger Warde II(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 세 명의 아들과 네 명의 딸을 두었다. 그녀는 1507년 3월 6일 영국 요르크실르에서 77세의 나이로 사망했으며 영국 요르크실르 와이이에 묻혔다.

pt.lifeSummary: Quando Joan Tunstall nasceu aproximadamente 1431, em Lancashire, Inglaterra, seu pai, Thomas Tunstall II, tinha 38 anos e sua mãe, Eleanor FitzHugh, tinha 38 anos. Ela casou-se com Sir Roger Warde II aproximadamente 1452, em Lancashire, Inglaterra. Eles tiveram pelo menos 3 filhos e 4 filhas. Ela faleceu em 6 de março de 1507, em Yorkshire, Inglaterra, com 77 anos, e foi sepultada em Wighill, Yorkshire, Inglaterra.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда Joan Tunstall родилась около 1431 г. в местности ланкашир, Англия, её отцу по имени Thomas Tunstall II было 38 лет, а матери, которую звали Eleanor FitzHugh, 38. Она вышла замуж за человека по имени Sir Roger Warde II около 1452 г. в местности ланкашир, Англия. У них было по крайней мере 3 сына и 4 дочери. Она умерла 6 марта 1507 г. в местности еркшир, Англия в возрасте 77 лет и была похоронена в местности ваиилл, еркшир, Англия.
